title:
Liz Elliott | Instagram Growth & Make Money Online on Instagram: "You need to SAVE THIS. This one prompt works on ChatGPT, Gemini, Meta AI... any LLM. It's the GOAT AI prompt for getting factual, reliable answers. ☝️

Take a screenshot or just comment below and I'll send you the copy-paste version.

This stops the AI from making things up, which is one of the biggest dangers of using it for real work.

Comment 👉”LIZ26” for my FREE .pdf with tutorials, prompts, kits, and more!

And repost this to help more people build a safer AI!

#chatgpt #aiprompts #businesshacks #tech #makemoneyonline"
